The '''''Yavin's Caprice''''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Gymsnor-3 light freighter/Legends|Gymsnor-3 light freighter]].

==History==
''Yavin's Caprice'' flew in remote areas with escorts. It was flanked with two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] fighters when it was raided by [[Sol Mon]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] forces in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].

During the attack, the pirates destroyed at least one of the two Y-wing fighters serving as escorts. The ''Yavin's Caprice'' was then boarded by the crew of a [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|Marauder Corvette]] and everyone on the cargo ship was either killed or captured.

==Appearances==
*[[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]] {{1st}}
